changes: Added the v2.0.2 kernel data architecture spec for release canon, closed-week delta, and live-week boundaries.
Added read-only canon inventory and one-week shard API contracts over existing immutable v2 canon artifacts.
Added closed-week delta shard support for post-release closed weeks without mutating immutable v2 canon artifacts.
Reserved aggregate shard metadata for future path-dependent all-time metrics without mutating v2 canon.
Added IndexedDB v2 shard stores and pure local inventory gap helpers beside the legacy monolithic bundle cache.
Added non-blocking active-variant kernel sync and a version badge kernel diagnostic line.
Added Status page kernel diagnostics for app/cache/canon identity, active shard inventory, and the closed/live boundary.
Wired kernel diagnostics to active Performance selection changes and added Status query-param inspection for selected strategy variants.
Added closed-history bundle composition from verified week shards with Basket snapshot fallback to legacy canon.
Allowed active Performance routes to open on kernel readiness while keeping legacy monolithic canon as failure fallback instead of delayed background download.
Skipped the legacy all-strategy background preload, repair, and global stamp path on kernel routes while still loading the active strategy payload explicitly.
Added an explicit active Performance strategy kernel payload endpoint over server-side strategy week shards.
Marked Matrix CFD/Crypto as provisional and outside the v2.0.2 Performance kernel readiness gate.
Aligned Performance week-strip overflow arrows and constrained the version popover with an opaque, internally scrollable release briefing list using no-store manifest reads.

Unified Basket drilldown row context across all periods, preserved current-week grid details for active full payloads including single-fill grids, and normalized per-grid fill display ordering for sparse delta sequences.
Added deterministic shard derivation tests so Phase 1 can validate per-week hashes before client cutover.
Bumped cacheNamespace to v2.0.2 for the new kernel contract surface while keeping canonVersion at v2.
Prepared v2.0.3 institutional-seed runtime metadata, source-freeze/certification lifecycle gates, active-baseline route readiness, and live-week overlay separation while keeping canonVersion at v2.

Released v2.0.4 Gate 28 runtime readiness: shared loading ownership, strict live/dev version separation, modular Documents release index, root env recovery, and Data/Performance/Status route readiness fixes without mutating v2 canon artifacts.

Released v2.0.5 Gate 29 performance data correctness: shared current/stored Basket hierarchy, planned ADR grid rows for 36-grid parity, selected-ledger Simulation equity-vs-balance preservation, signed Summary card tone, COT pending copy cleanup, and theme-safe Equity/Total chart colour without mutating v2 canon artifacts.

versionHistory.summary: Gate 29 performance data correctness: current/stored Basket parity, selected-ledger Simulation Equity/Balance, signed Summary card tone, COT copy cleanup, and theme-safe chart colours.
Gate 28 runtime readiness: shared loading ownership, live/dev version separation, modular Documents index, env recovery, and route readiness fixes.
Institutional seed active baseline, source-freeze lifecycle, active-baseline certification, route readiness, and live-week overlay separation.

Kernel Phase 1/3 read-only canon inventory, week/delta shard API contracts, client shard-store groundwork, active-variant runtime sync, strategy kernel payload, active-only strategy boot, and Status diagnostics.
Week rollover execution-return fix, current-week Basket alignment, and version discipline formalization.
Versioning + immutable canon + Basket rebuild + LIMNI LABS nav.
